description: Comprehensive JSON structure for lifecycle phase management across 0-18 age groups

age_groups.name: Infancy
age_groups.description: Birth through early toddlerhood with focus on survival, health, bonding, and foundational care

age_groups.name: Early Childhood
age_groups.description: Preschool years focused on development, language acquisition, socialization, and school preparation

age_groups.name: Middle Childhood
age_groups.description: Primary school years emphasizing education, skill development, peer relationships, and independence

age_groups.name: Adolescence
age_groups.description: Secondary school years focused on identity formation, vocational exploration, legal rights, and transition to adulthood

phases.title: Birth & Registration
phases.description: Legal registration, religious naming ceremony, and foundational identity establishment

legal_obligations.consequence: Loss of nationality rights, educational enrollment restrictions

checklist: Registration application submitted to civil authorities

phases.title: Newborn Health & Immunization
phases.description: Mandatory vaccinations, health checkups, and nutritional assessment

legal_obligations.obligation: Mandatory vaccination compliance per national health codes

checklist: Vaccination schedule initiated per national guidelines
Feeding plan documented with healthcare provider

phases.title: Early Bonding & Development
phases.description: Parental guardianship establishment, medical consent, and inheritance planning

legal_obligations.consequence: Loss of custody rights, legal disputes

phases.title: Mobility & Language Development
phases.description: Physical development support, language exposure, and home safety measures

legal_obligations.obligation: Dietary guidelines compliance per health authority

checklist: Early intervention services identified if needed

phases.title: Transition to Toddlerhood
phases.description: Second-year health protocols and transition planning to early childhood

phases.title: Preschool Entry & Socialization
phases.description: School enrollment, health compliance, and initial social development

legal_obligations.obligation: Parental consent for early education curriculum

phases.title: Language & Cognitive Development
phases.description: Language assessments, cognitive development tracking, and educational support

legal_obligations.obligation: Assessment of developmental progress per national standards
Speech and language screening if indicated

phases.title: Social-Emotional & Play Development
phases.description: Behavioral assessment, social skills development, and kindergarten readiness

legal_obligations.obligation: Kindergarten readiness evaluation per national standards

phases.title: Pre-Kindergarten Skills & Independence
phases.description: Final preschool year, kindergarten registration, and school readiness

legal_obligations.obligation: Health and vaccination requirements for primary school

phases.title: Age Group 2 Completion & Transition
phases.description: Comprehensive developmental assessment and transition to primary school

legal_obligations.obligation: Documentation of early childhood phase completion

checklist: Parent briefing on primary school conducted

resources.resource_name: Individual Education Plan (IEP) templates if applicable

phases.title: Primary School Entry & Adaptation
phases.description: Compulsory education enrollment, school attendance compliance, and adaptation

legal_obligations.obligation: Compulsory education enrollment per national law
Health and safety protocols for school

phases.title: Academic Foundation & Early Learning
phases.description: Attendance monitoring, academic progress tracking, and curriculum assessments
documents_needed: Report cards and academic progress reports

phases.title: Skill Development & Peer Relationships
phases.description: Talent development, anti-bullying measures, and peer relationship management

phases.title: Independence & Responsibility
phases.description: Academic accountability, secondary school preparation, and civic responsibility

phases.title: Age Group 3 Completion & Secondary Transition
phases.description: Primary school completion, secondary school enrollment, and comprehensive assessment
checklist: Parent briefing on secondary school conducted

phases.title: Secondary School Entry & Identity Formation
phases.description: Secondary school enrollment, identity documentation updates, and religious/civic education

legal_obligations.obligation: Secondary school enrollment and attendance compliance
Religious education and civic responsibility education

phases.title: Academic & Vocational Exploration
phases.description: Career counseling, vocational programs exploration, and aptitude assessment

legal_obligations.obligation: Academic progress documentation per national standards

phases.title: Skill Development & Social Responsibility
phases.description: Advanced academics, community service, and part-time work regulations

legal_obligations.obligation: Social service or community engagement requirement

phases.title: Pre-Adulthood Preparation & Rights Education
phases.description: Legal rights education, higher education planning, and adult status preparation

phases.title: Transition to Adulthood & Graduations
phases.description: Secondary school graduation and attainment of legal adulthood status

resources.resource_name: Final health and developmental assessment tools

phases.title: Age Group 4 Completion & Full Adult Transition
phases.description: Legal adult rights/responsibilities, record archival, and program completion

legal_obligations.obligation: Full legal adult rights and responsibilities

metadata.author: CYCLE-VIE Development Team
metadata.notes: Complete lifecycle framework covering 0-18 years with 22 phases, legal obligations, financial requirements, checklists, resources, and documentation needs for each phase.
